description: Delete rblocks from the model. If a range is specified, only rblocks within the range are removed.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Use itasca.command('rblock delete ...') via command interface

keywords.name: aspect-ratio
keywords.description: Delete rigid blocks with aspect ratio between f1 and f2 inclusive. If only f1 is provided then rigid blocks with aspect ratio greater than or equal to this value are deleted.

keywords.name: ratio-mean
keywords.description: Delete rigid blocks based on {area in 2D; volume in 3D}, termed rigid block size in the descriptions below. Delete rigid blocks with size between f1 and f2 inclusive. If only f1 is provided then rigid blocks with size less than or equal to this value are deleted. Delete rigid blocks with size less than or equal to f multiplied by the maximum rigid block size. Delete rigid blocks with size less than or equal to f multiplied by the average rigid block size.

keywords.name: aspect-ratio
keywords.description: Delete rigid blocks with aspect ratio between f1 and f2 inclusive. If only f1 is provided then rigid blocks with aspect ratio greater than or equal to this value are deleted.

keywords.name: number-contacts
keywords.description: Delete rigid blocks with total number of contacts (active and inactive) less than or equal to i . This is done recursively until no rigid blocks fit the deletion criteria.

keywords.name: ratio-mean
keywords.description: Delete rigid blocks based on {area in 2D; volume in 3D}, termed rigid block size in the descriptions below. Delete rigid blocks with size between f1 and f2 inclusive. If only f1 is provided then rigid blocks with size less than or equal to this value are deleted. Delete rigid blocks with size less than or equal to f multiplied by the maximum rigid block size. Delete rigid blocks with size less than or equal to f multiplied by the average rigid block size.

keywords.name: unbonded
keywords.description: Delete rigid blocks that are not bonded to any other pieces.
